'''鈭歵h-n-g-k''' ('''kathangekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubblize|rubblize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-n-g-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubblize|rubblize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-n-g-k
|-
! Lemma
| kathangekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithangekoko|thithangekoko]] || [[word:jithangekoko|jithangekoko]] || [[word:shithangekoko|shithangekoko]] || [[word:kithangekoko|kithangekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthangekoko|thuthuthangekoko]] || [[word:jujuthangekoko|jujuthangekoko]] || [[word:shushuthangekoko|shushuthangekoko]] || [[word:kukuthangekoko|kukuthangekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthangekoko|thuthangekoko]] || [[word:juthangekoko|juthangekoko]] || [[word:shuthangekoko|shuthangekoko]] || [[word:kuthangekoko|kuthangekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthangekoko|thuthangekoko]] || [[word:juthangekoko|juthangekoko]] || [[word:shuthangekoko|shuthangekoko]] || [[word:kuthangekoko|kuthangekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethangekoko|thethangekoko]] || [[word:jethangekoko|jethangekoko]] || [[word:shethangekoko|shethangekoko]] || [[word:kethangekoko|kethangekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothangekoko|thothothangekoko]] || [[word:jojothangekoko|jojothangekoko]] || [[word:shoshothangekoko|shoshothangekoko]] || [[word:kokothangekoko|kokothangekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothangekoko|thothangekoko]] || [[word:jothangekoko|jothangekoko]] || [[word:shothangekoko|shothangekoko]] || [[word:kothangekoko|kothangekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothangekoko|thothangekoko]] || [[word:jothangekoko|jothangekoko]] || [[word:shothangekoko|shothangekoko]] || [[word:kothangekoko|kothangekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙thangekoko|th忙thangekoko]] || [[word:j忙thangekoko|j忙thangekoko]] || [[word:sh忙thangekoko|sh忙thangekoko]] || [[word:k忙thangekoko|k忙thangekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathangekoko|thathathangekoko]] || [[word:jajathangekoko|jajathangekoko]] || [[word:shashathangekoko|shashathangekoko]] || [[word:kakathangekoko|kakathangekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathangekoko|thathangekoko]] || [[word:jathangekoko|jathangekoko]] || [[word:shathangekoko|shathangekoko]] || [[word:kathangekoko|kathangekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathangekoko|thathangekoko]] || [[word:jathangekoko|jathangekoko]] || [[word:shathangekoko|shathangekoko]] || [[word:kathangekoko|kathangekoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shathangekithi|shathangekithi]] || [[word:shathangekiji|shathangekiji]] || [[word:shathangekishi|shathangekishi]] || [[word:shathangekiki|shathangekiki]]
